completed_tracks: Track 14: Workspace Diagnostics, Audits & Pre-commit Hooks
Track 15: Power BI Semantic Model Integration
notes: All 16 tracks are complete. Track 13 final deliverables include cargo-llvm-cov coverage wiring, staged Cargo dry-run validation, Python wheel/twine verification, inline parse_filter_pair tests, and expanded core coverage tests. Local Python wheel verification passes with Python 3.12 and twine. The 90% coverage gate is CI-gated locally because stable-x86_64-pc-windows-gnu lacks profiler_builtins, while stable-x86_64-pc-windows-msvc has profiler support but this host lacks a real MSVC linker and Windows SDK import libraries.
